gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/164)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/164)
text: رَجُلٍ تَرَكَ خَمْسَةَ إِخْوَةٍ وَ جَدّاً قَالَ هِيَ مِنْ سِتَّةٍ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمْ سَهْمٌ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Ubeys Bin Hisham, from Mushma’al Bin Sa’ad, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who left five brothers and a grandfather. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is from six (shares), for every one among them, a share’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ‘Ubays ibn Hisham from Mushma‘il ibn Sa‘d from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “About the case of a man who leaves behind five brothers and a grandfather, abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is distributed from six; one part for each’”
